pages.text: $(thing)Iron's Botany$() weaves Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks into the mana network. Botanical mana powers spells, spells reshape Botania machinery, and a new $(l:ironsbotany/index)Botany school$() of magic emerges from the bridge.$(br2)This index entry is the canonical Lexica gateway. The full Botany guidebook is the $(item)Botanical Grimoire$() — craft one to unlock the deeper material.

pages.title: Mana inks
pages.text: Three tiers of $(thing)Mana Ink$() are crafted at the Petal Apothecary, replacing vanilla ink for ISS scroll forging:$(br)$(li)Minor Mana Ink — uncommon scrolls$(li)Greater Mana Ink — rare scrolls$(li)Prime Mana Ink — epic scrolls

pages.title: School power orbs
pages.text: The $(thing)Runic Altar$() forges Iron's Spellbooks $(thing)Spell Power Orbs$() keyed to ISS schools — Fire, Frost, Lightning, Holy, Ender, Blood, Nature, and Eldritch. Each consumes one Greater Mana Ink and the matching Botania rune.

pages.title: Alfheim trades
pages.text: The $(thing)Alfheim Portal$() upgrades Iron's Botany weapons into elven variants — Manasteel into Elementium, Livingwood into Dreamwood, and Greater Mana Ink into Prime Mana Ink at a discount.

pages.title: Gaia Guardian II
pages.text: Iron's Botany hooks into the $(thing)Gaia Guardian II$() loot table: hardmode kills now drop $(item)Legendary Ink$() in addition to the vanilla rewards, gating ISS legendary scroll crafting behind Botania's hardest fight.
